planning_summary: The planned digital twin for CNC machining systems is focused on providing real-time data-driven insights and automated decision-making processes to optimize scheduling, maintenance, and quality control. The feasible capabilities identified support the R2 level of the 4R Framework, which involves replicating the physical system in a virtual environment.
risks_or_notes: The current planning does not include detailed modeling or validation steps required for R3 (Reality) phase, such as scenario exploration and independent execution capability. There is also no explicit mention of predictive models or what-if analysis, which are critical for R3 level.

R1.summary: The planning does not explicitly define the digital twin's purpose, scope, or supported decisions.

gate_scores.criterion: The digital twin purpose, scope, and supported decisions are explicitly defined.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] The digital twin must determine whether we have the capability and capacity to run a given job, optimize scheduling based on available equipment, and automate key decision-making processes that currently rely on manual judgment.
gate_scores.rationale: No explicit definition of DT purpose, scope, and supported decisions. | evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: UX.BV

gate_scores.criterion: System boundaries, major components, inputs/outputs, and important states are identified.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] The digital twin must determine whether we have the capability and capacity to run a given job, optimize scheduling based on available equipment, and automate key decision-making processes that currently rely on manual judgment.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IR.EG, IR.IO

gate_scores.criterion: Critical variables are selected without major over-instrumentation or missing context.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] We need a digital twin of our CNC machining systems to provide accurate, data-driven insight into Quality, Cost, and Time before production begins.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.AI, DS.TR, UX.RM

gate_scores.criterion: A repeatable data collection and storage pipeline exists.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] By integrating real-time machine data with predictive simulation, the digital twin will enable proactive maintenance, reduce cycle time, extend asset life, and ensure that every job is run on the right machine, at the right time, with predictable and efficient performance.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.AI, IR.ET, DS.ST, IR.EG

gate_scores.criterion: Collected data is structured, usable, and verified against known system behavior.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.TR

action_items_tailored: Define the digital twin's purpose, target decisions, and expected outcomes.

R2.summary: The planning supports R2 by defining system boundaries, critical variables, data collection pipelines, and live data-driven model inputs.

gate_scores.criterion: R1 is already satisfied.
gate_scores.evidence: Documented system boundaries, static properties, dynamic states, and sensor or data source map.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence of critical variables selection without over-instrumentation.

gate_scores.criterion: Replication targets, required outputs, and acceptable error thresholds are defined.
gate_scores.evidence: Defined repeatable data collection and storage pipeline with edge devices for real-time monitoring.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear explicit evidence of a repeatable data collection and storage pipeline.

gate_scores.criterion: A modeling platform has been selected and the system has been mapped into a digital architecture.
gate_scores.evidence: Live or recorded data can drive model inputs and updates through IoT integration.
gate_scores.rationale: Partial evidence of live data-driven model inputs. | evidence found in prior outputs

gate_scores.criterion: Live or recorded data can drive model inputs and updates.
gate_scores.evidence: The digital twin is mapped into a virtual environment with real-time monitoring capabilities.
gate_scores.rationale: Clear explicit evidence of the DT being mapped into a virtual environment.

gate_scores.criterion: The model has been tested against real behavior and verified to reproduce outputs with acceptable deviation.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs

action_items_tailored: Define which system outputs must be reproduced and set allowable error thresholds.
Select the modeling environment and justify why it fits the system behavior.

R3.summary: The planning does not explicitly define prediction targets, decision variables, or objective functions for R3 level.

gate_scores.criterion: R2 is already satisfied.
gate_scores.rationale: No explicit definition of prediction targets, decision variables, or objective functions.

gate_scores.criterion: Prediction targets, decision variables, and objective functions are defined.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] It should continuously monitor degradation of cutting tools, spindles, and coolant, predict remaining useful life, and assess how component wear will impact part quality and throughput.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can run without continuous live dependency on the physical system.
gate_scores.evidence: [step0] Limited historical data for accurate forecasting models.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: DS.BP, DS.AS

gate_scores.criterion: Predictive or scenario-exploration models are implemented.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] By integrating real-time machine data with predictive simulation, the digital twin will enable proactive maintenance, reduce cycle time, extend asset life, and ensure that every job is run on the right machine, at the right time, with predictable and efficient performance.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can evaluate what-if conditions and provide actionable recommendations or optimized results.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] The digital twin must determine whether we have the capability and capacity to run a given job, optimize scheduling based on available equipment, and automate key decision-making processes that currently rely on manual judgment.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.OS

action_items_tailored: Define what the DT must predict, the time horizon, and the decisions it should support.

R4.summary: The planning does not include autonomy scope, human-in-the-loop boundaries, or real-time anomaly detection for R4 level.

gate_scores.criterion: R3 is already satisfied.
gate_scores.rationale: No explicit definition of autonomy scope, human-in-the-loop boundaries, or real-time anomaly detection.

gate_scores.criterion: Autonomy scope, human-in-the-loop boundaries, and override conditions are defined.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.OS, TW.SC

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can detect anomalies or changing conditions in real time.
gate_scores.evidence: [problem_statement] By integrating real-time machine data with predictive simulation, the digital twin will enable proactive maintenance, reduce cycle time, extend asset life, and ensure that every job is run on the right machine, at the right time, with predictable and efficient performance.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI, UX.RM, MG.SM

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can choose among actions based on learned or adaptive logic.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: Past outcomes are stored and used to improve future decisions.
gate_scores.evidence: [step1] Regularly engage with key stakeholders to gather feedback and make necessary adjustments.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: IC.AI

gate_scores.criterion: The DT can make or execute decisions with acceptable trust and safety controls.
gate_scores.evidence: [step0] Lack of robust security measures for sensitive data.
gate_scores.rationale: evidence found in prior outputs; aligned feasible capabilities: TW.SC

action_items_tailored: Define whether the DT is advisory, semi-autonomous, or fully autonomous.
